\tzpentry{ID5504}{Document Quantum Spectral Gap Laplacian Operator}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5504 introduces Document Quantum Spectral Gap Laplacian Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \Delta x = \sqrt{\frac{\hbar}{2m\omega_{\mathrm{eff}}}}, \qquad \Delta p = \sqrt{\frac{\hbar m\omega_{\mathrm{eff}}}{2}}, \qquad \Delta x\,\Delta p = \frac{\hbar}{2}. \label{eq:uncertainty_shift} \end{equation}
